question: The cleansing of the Temple: how do the Synoptics and John place it differently, and what OT ‘house of prayer’ / ‘zeal’ texts are being appealed to either way?

choices.A: Synoptics place it late; John places it early; both frame it with OT ‘house of prayer’ and ‘zeal for your house’ themes.
choices.B: All four place it on the same day in the same sequence with identical wording.
choices.C: Only John includes it and the Synoptics omit it completely.
choices.D: It has no OT background and is purely political.

teaching.title: One act, different placement, shared OT framing
teaching.body: The Synoptics locate the Temple action in the final Jerusalem week, while John places a similar event early. Either way, the writers frame the act with OT language: the Temple’s purpose as a house of prayer and the theme of zeal for God’s house. Apologetically, the OT citations show the act is interpreted theologically, not merely as a protest stunt.
